request.prompt:
You are a precise data extraction algorithm. Analyze the following content regarding a possible strike from "ATAC" (the public transport company of Rome, Lazio (12)). IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS: 1. Decide if this document is actually announcing a new/upcoming strike. - If it is a cancellation/revocation of a strike, set isStrike to false. - If it is just providing information about participation (adesione) of a strike that already happened, set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time updates about an ongoing strike (e.g., "the metro is currently closed due to a strike"), set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time service updates (e.g., metro is open/closed during the strike), set isStrike to false. - ONLY set isStrike to true if it is an announcement of an upcoming strike. 2. If isStrike is true, extract the strike details: - Dates must be in 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' format. - Guaranteed times must be arrays of 'HH:mm-HH:mm' (omitted if not specified). - Location codes should be: 2-digit ISTAT for regions (e.g., "03" for Lombardia), or omitted for national strikes. Example Output if NOT a strike: { "isStrike": false } Example Output if IS a strike: { "isStrike": true, "strikeData": { "startDate": "2024-12-31 08:30:00", "endDate": "2024-12-31 12:30:00", "locationType": "REGIONAL", "locationCodes": ["12"], "guaranteedTimes": ["06:00-09:00", "18:00-21:00"] } } Input Content (Pre-processing: dom-distillation):

Context Metadata

  • Page Title: Lunedì 27 novembre sciopero nazionale del trasporto pubblico, possibili disagi - Roma Servizi per la Mobilità

Lunedì 27 novembre sciopero nazionale del trasporto pubblico, possibili disagi

Pubblicato il: 21/11/2023 - Aggiornato il: 21/11/2023

status: 1 Lunedì 27 novembre trasporto pubblico a rischio per lo sciopero nazionale di 24 ore proclamato dai sindacati Usb, Orsa, Sgb, Cub, Adl e Cobas. A Roma l’agitazione interesserà la rete Atac e i bus periferici della Roma Tpl. Il servizio sarà comunque regolare fino alle 8,30 e dalle 17 alle 20. Aggiornamenti in tempo reale su romamobilita.it

response.thoughts:
**Strike Analysis: Italian Public Transport**

Okay, let's break this down. My task is clear: I need to analyze this text and determine if it describes a strike, and if so, extract the relevant information into a structured JSON object. The input is in Italian, which is fine, I can handle that. I see the phrase "sciopero nazionale" which immediately flags it as a national strike. The text clearly states "Lunedì 27 novembre sciopero nazionale del trasporto pubblico, possibili disagi" and "24 ore proclamato dai sindacati", so strike confirmed.

Now, I have to extract the specifics. "Lunedì 27 novembre" gives me the date: November 27, 2023. The "24 ore" indicates a full day strike, from 00:00 to 23:59:59 on that day. "sciopero nazionale" tells me this is a nationwide event, and I will set the location type to "NATIONAL". I note that Atac in Rome (Lazio: 12) is mentioned as affected, though this is not a location code.

Ah, there are also guaranteed times, typical for strikes in Italy: "Il servizio sarà comunque regolare fino alle 8,30 e dalle 17 alle 20." This means service will be regular until 8:30 AM and again from 5 PM to 8 PM. I'll translate that to "00:00-08:30" and "17:00-20:00" and include them in the `guaranteedTimes` field.

The output will be a single JSON object. Here's what I'll construct:

```json
{
  "isStrike": true,
  "strikeData": {
    "startDate": "2023-11-27 00:00:00",
    "endDate": "2023-11-27 23:59:59",
    "locationType": "NATIONAL",
    "locationCodes": null,
    "guaranteedTimes": ["00:00-08:30", "17:00-20:00"]
  }
}
```

That should be clean and parseable. I'm ready to proceed.
